goal: Pre-implementation exercise map for future delivery of Java 25 certification preparation assets.
intendedOutcome: Flashcard recall coverage for exam-style code reading and behavior reasoning.
Programming exercises that train implementation, API design, and debugging skills.
A roadmap-mapped backlog ready for iterative implementation without missing core objectives.

questionPatterns: Which member declaration compiles with the shown package structure?
Which visibility choice causes unintended API exposure?
Which access modifier keeps this method inaccessible to subclasses?
flashcards.focus: compile-time visibility, API surface discipline, and encapsulation traps.

exercisePatterns: Design two related classes with safe field visibility and constructor invariants.
Refactor package-visible helper methods to proper visibility without breaking behavior.
programmingExercises.focus: access-level audits and API contract shaping.

exitCriteria: Explain the same behavior with a different example

questionPatterns: Which method signature is selected for this overload set?

exitCriteria: Explain the same behavior with a different example
